acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Registry parses and every checklist row has stable id requirement and evidence-required rule
acceptance_gates.title: Checklist promoted to canonical authority

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: PEER without verified OS peer credential evidence is denied and PEER with verified evidence is accepted
acceptance_gates.title: PEER fail-closed regression

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Every audit item has class owner spec target implementation target and gate
acceptance_gates.title: Implementation-ahead classification ready

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Execution_Plan can be delegated to agents without missing tracking or closure-model artifacts
acceptance_gates.title: Execution_Plan execution-control artifacts ready

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: No target row remains server_unspecified or undocumented_implementation
acceptance_gates.title: Spec authority complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: All driver-required and code-visible methods/providers are registered with support state verifier boundary and fail-closed behavior
acceptance_gates.title: Auth registry complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: All native-wire/session/connect/cancel/reset/reauth/notification/message schemas are byte specified
acceptance_gates.title: Wire/session byte authority complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Every D7/D8/D9/D13 metadata and type row has canonical byte/layout authority
acceptance_gates.title: Parameter/result/type authority complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Old/new client/server feature negotiation downgrade and unknown extension behavior are specified with test rows
acceptance_gates.title: Protocol version skew authority complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Unsupported guarded conditional and N/A behavior has exact SQLSTATE message vector retryability and finality status
acceptance_gates.title: Deterministic refusal authority complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Every accepted spec feature is implemented and every unaccepted implementation-ahead feature is guarded or refused
acceptance_gates.title: Implementation reconciled

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Malformed input replay downgrade and race cases fail closed without crash auth bypass or MGA finality drift
acceptance_gates.title: Fuzz and fault injection gate complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Every lane status file has no required not_started implemented_without_evidence server_unspecified or undocumented_implementation rows
acceptance_gates.title: Driver and adapter manifests complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Every claimed lane has reproducible package metadata install smoke signing or explicit non-signing citation and build output isolation
acceptance_gates.title: Packaging distribution evidence complete

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: CTest rejects missing row evidence and passes all claimed driver/adaptor/tool routes
acceptance_gates.title: CTest driver gate passes

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Every claimed driver lane packet runs against live ScratchBird route and records evidence
acceptance_gates.title: Server verification packets pass

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Benchmark uses client/tool to SBWP/TLS or admitted IPC to listener/parser/server/engine route and engine auth policy
acceptance_gates.title: Benchmark route correct

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Real-route latency throughput TLS overhead bulk transfer and allocation budgets are measured and enforced
acceptance_gates.title: Performance budget gate passes

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Driver adapter and tool docs include executable sample apps for DSN auth TLS diagnostics transactions metadata and lifecycle
acceptance_gates.title: Documentation and sample app gate passes

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Donor compatibility tests use donor tools or compatibility drivers through the admitted ScratchBird route
acceptance_gates.title: Donor-driver compatibility route gate passes

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Public registry and inventory reflect true implemented/proven state
acceptance_gates.title: Inventory synchronized

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: All gates pass and no target row is grey
acceptance_gates.title: Final closure

acceptance_gates.pass_rule: Release declaration states supported fail_closed conditional_n/a or not_implemented for every checklist row and lane
acceptance_gates.title: Machine-readable release declaration generated

rows.capability: Driver self-registration with the framework's driver registry
Validate live connection without round-tripping a query
Application name / client identification carried to server
Auth-method probe before any privileged call
Token rotation / refresh during long sessions
In-place TLS reload (cert rotation without disconnect)
All canonical ScratchBird DSN keys recognized
Aliases for legacy donor keys (PGSSLMODE, MYSQL_*) emit a deprecation diagnostic
Execute SQL returning a result set
Execute SQL returning a single scalar
Multiple result sets from one statement
Server-side parameter array bind for high-throughput insert
Statement metadata before execute (parameter and result descriptors)
EXPLAIN/EXPLAIN ANALYZE round-trip via standard execute
Array parameter binding (whole array as one value)
Parameter direction validation (cannot bind output to input position)
Untyped parameter inference (driver picks type from runtime value)
Parameter inspection (read-back value, type after bind)
Result-set metadata (column count, name, type, nullability, precision, scale)
Typed getter for each baseline scalar (int/long/float/double/decimal/string/bytes/bool/date/time/timestamp/timestamptz/uuid)
Generic getter (getObject(col, T.class)) for runtime typing
Server-side cursor with paging fetch size
Charset round-trip across UTF-8, UTF-16, GB18030, Shift-JIS, ISO-8859-1, etc.
Round-trip NaN / Inf / -0.0 / subnormals for floats
Round-trip empty string vs NULL distinguishable
Prepared transaction (limbo) detect / commit / rollback by GID
No silent retry of aborted transactions
Statement boundary scoped to current transaction (cancel does not bleed)
Next statement after cancel runs cleanly
Cancel of prepared-statement reuse cleans server cache
Cancel error distinguishable from network error
Stack-trace plus server-side stack on PSQL exception
Numeric / string / system / datetime function lists
Cluster-readable catalog views (under cluster.sys.*) accessible when cluster is present
All metadata calls obey current search_path and case-fold rules
All metadata calls binary-decode (no text fallback) per spec rule
All metadata calls source from sys.* user-readable views
Bulk insert (server-side COPY FROM / BULK INSERT)
Bulk insert with rollback / progress / error rows
Result-set streaming with bounded memory (no full materialization)
Connection multiplexing (multiple logical sessions per physical)
MARS (Multiple Active Result Sets) per physical connection
All blocking surfaces have an async counterpart
Notification carries channel + payload + sender PID
OpenTelemetry / tracing span emitted per statement
Provider exposes counter / histogram for completed/failed/in-flight ops
Redaction policy for sensitive parameters in logs
Cursor concurrency (read-only vs updatable vs values)
Lane build matrix (OS × runtime version × architecture)
Performance benchmark vs lane BIC (TPS, latency p50/p95/p99, allocation, TLS overhead, prepared-statement reuse, COPY throughput)
Compatibility matrix vs lane BIC (feature parity table)
Distribution channel evidence (NuGet, Maven Central, npm, PyPI, crates.io, RubyGems, pub.dev, Hex, CRAN, OS package repos)
Public release notes with breaking-change call-outs
DSN keys per appendix-driver-dsn-and-config-standard.md (every key supported, every alias mapped)

rows.capability: Adapter forwards every relevant DSN key from §3.5
Adapter supports the host framework's secret/credential model
Adapter introspects every metadata surface in §3.13 it needs
Adapter generates DDL covering every type in §3.9 (or refuses with named diagnostic)
Adapter supports schema migration / synchronization per host convention
Adapter respects ScratchBird name resolution rules (case-fold, identifier profiles)
Adapter parameter binding covers every type in §3.9 (or routes to driver's typed binder)
Adapter pagination supports server-side cursor (where host idiom permits)
Adapter bulk insert routes to §3.14.1 where available
Adapter supports the host's transaction model and maps to §3.10
Adapter supports the host's async model and maps to §3.16
Adapter exposes underlying driver's cancellation tokens per §3.11
Adapter preserves SQLSTATE and native error code from driver
Adapter surfaces server Detail, Hint, Where, Position fields
Adapter integrates with host logging framework
Adapter integrates with host telemetry / tracing (OpenTelemetry, Application Insights, etc.)
Adapter cleanly shuts down when host is shut down (no leaked connections)
Adapter handles driver reconnect per §3.10.16 (does not assume idle session)
Adapter version compatibility matrix vs supported host framework versions
Adapter packaging artifact published to host's standard registry (Maven Central, npm, PyPI, NuGet, etc.)
Adapter SBOM and license attribution complete
End-to-end test against live ScratchBird server
Compatibility matrix vs host's reference dialect (PostgreSQL, SQL Server, etc.)
